articles.title: Here Are the 2026 Tony Awards Winners: Full List
articles.why: The full Tony Awards winners list is the essential document from Broadway's biggest night — Schmigadoon! winning Best Musical is a surprise that will reshape how the industry thinks about musical comedy and streaming-born IP on stage.
articles.hook: Schmigadoon! — the Apple TV+ musical satire — just won the Tony for Best Musical, with one writer taking home three separate Tonys for the same show.

articles.title: ‘Schmigadoon!’ Crowns Apple TV EGOT Feat With Best Musical Tony Award Win
articles.why: Schmigadoon! winning Best Musical gives Apple TV+ its first Tony — completing an EGOT for the streaming platform, a genuinely historic milestone in the awards landscape and a signal of how streaming has fully colonized every corner of prestige entertainment.
articles.hook: Apple TV+ is now an EGOT — Schmigadoon! just won Best Musical and completed the set.

articles.title: ‘Cats: Jellicle Ball’ Costume Designer Qween Jean Becomes First Openly Trans Tony Award Winner
articles.why: Qween Jean becoming the first openly trans woman to win a Tony Award is a historic first that goes beyond awards-season coverage — it's a structural milestone for trans visibility in the most prestigious live theater institution in America.
articles.hook: Qween Jean just became the first openly trans woman to win a Tony Award, taking home Best Costume Design for Cats: The Jellicle Ball.

articles.title: With Trump at Game 3, NYPD scraps watch party
articles.why: Trump attending NBA Finals Game 3 at MSG — triggering security measures that cancel the outdoor watch party for thousands of New York fans — is the kind of collision between politics and culture that generates real friction and conversation.
articles.hook: Trump is attending Game 3 of the NBA Finals at MSG, and the NYPD canceled the outdoor watch party for thousands of fans to handle the security footprint.

articles.title: P!nk, Queen Latifah, Whitney Leavitt & Alex Newell Dazzle 2026 Tonys With ‘Chicago’ Medley for 30th Anniversary
articles.why: The Tony Awards are Broadway's biggest cultural moment of the year, and a Chicago 30th anniversary tribute anchored by P!nk, Queen Latifah, and Whitney Leavitt is exactly the kind of marquee performance that drives the night's cultural conversation.
articles.hook: P!nk, Queen Latifah, and Broadway stars brought Chicago back to life at the Tonys — 30 years after the show first opened on Broadway.

articles.title: P!nk Leads Rousing “Lady Marmalade” Tonys Opener With Megan Thee Stallion, Sara Chase, The Guy With A Cake, Whitney Leavitt & Cast Members From Broadway’s Finest – Watch And Read The Lyrics
articles.why: P!nk opening the Tonys dressed as Peter Pan with Megan Thee Stallion on a stage full of Broadway cast members is the kind of maximalist, unexpected television moment that people will be talking about Monday morning — Broadway at its most unruly.
articles.hook: P!nk opened the Tonys dressed as Peter Pan, flew in on wires, and shared the stage with Megan Thee Stallion for a 'Lady Marmalade' blowout.

articles.title: Tonys Snubs and Surprises: Alden Ehrenreich Beats Tight Competition, Nathan Lane Loses for ‘Salesman’ and More
articles.why: The full Tony Awards snubs and surprises breakdown is the essential post-ceremony read — Alden Ehrenreich beating tight competition and Nathan Lane losing despite a critically acclaimed Salesman are the two most surprising outcomes of the night.
articles.hook: Nathan Lane lost the Tony for Death of a Salesman despite leading the field — and Alden Ehrenreich upset everyone to take Best Actor in a Musical.

articles.title: The Knicks solved their minutes puzzle just in tim...
articles.why: The Knicks' bench rotation was one of the most discussed tactical questions heading into the Finals, and this piece provides a clear answer at exactly the right moment — Game 3 at MSG is tonight.
articles.hook: The Knicks figured out their biggest roster problem right before the most important game they've played at Madison Square Garden in 27 years.

articles.title: Wemby, Spurs undaunted by 0-2 hole vs. Knicks
articles.why: Wembanyama and the Spurs staring down a 0-2 deficit while remaining publicly confident is the underdog story arc that makes Finals narratives compelling — and the question of whether Wemby can will them back is one of sports' live questions today.
articles.hook: Victor Wembanyama is down 0-2 in the NBA Finals at 20 years old, and the Spurs are still acting like they're going to win it.

articles.title: Nelly Korda makes childhood dream come true with f...
articles.why: Nelly Korda winning back-to-back majors at the US Women's Open is a landmark achievement, and this piece contextualizes what it means for her position as the best player in the game — important framing beyond the scorecard.
articles.hook: Nelly Korda just won back-to-back majors and no one in women's golf is close to touching her right now.

articles.title: Oil prices spike over 3% as Iran and Israel trade strikes, escalating regional tensions
articles.why: Oil spiking over 3% on renewed Iran-Israel strikes is a direct economic consequence of geopolitical escalation — this is the clearest price signal that markets are treating the ceasefire as effectively broken.
articles.hook: Oil just jumped more than 3% as Iran and Israel trade strikes, with traders treating the ceasefire as functionally over.

articles.title: John Oliver Jokes CBS News Fired Scott Pelley For “The Crime Of Being Too Cool In A Meeting”
articles.why: John Oliver using his platform to weigh in on the Scott Pelley firing adds cultural commentary to an ongoing media industry story — but this is a secondary angle on a story already in the briefing.
articles.hook: John Oliver said CBS fired Scott Pelley for 'the crime of being too cool in a meeting.'

articles.title: How To Watch The 2026 Tony Awards: Red Carpet, Pre-Show & P!nk-Hosted Ceremony
articles.why: The Tonys are Broadway's biggest night and this year's ceremony — with P!nk hosting and major historical wins — earned its place as a cultural event worth tracking.
articles.hook: Broadway's biggest night had P!nk, history-making wins, and Apple TV+ leaving with an EGOT.

articles.title: Why AI hyperscalers are now the epicenter of a bear case for stocks
articles.why: The AI hyperscalers — the companies that have been carrying the entire bull market — are now being identified as the central bear case for stocks, a significant inversion from their role as the market's engine of optimism.
articles.hook: The same AI infrastructure giants that powered the bull market are now being called the biggest single risk to it.
